name: brainer
description: Token/context-efficient skills for AI coding agents. 23 skills across output style, planning, lean execution, verification, wiki memory (write-gate / wiki-refresh / provenance trust), prompt triage, PreCompact extraction, semantic AST diff, output filtering, retrieval indexing, user-triggered task retrospectives, report-only Brainer audits, loop/verifier-gate design, LLM-as-judge output gating, source-to-skill learning (learn-skill: /learn + telemetry-gated promotion), a visible requirements ledger (no user request dropped), and drift mitigation (one always-on watcher: periodic re-anchor + symptomatic probes). Measured per-skill savings range from ~-20% (routing) to ~-97% (re-reads / compaction) depending on skill type; see eval/FINDINGS.md.
author: Saar Shai

plugins.name: brainer
plugins.description: All 23 skills bundled; compliance-canary (the single drift watcher — periodic re-anchor + symptomatic probes, formerly two skills) auto-wires its UserPromptSubmit hook (auto-install: true, default-on since v1.7) and now also enforces requirements-ledger (no user request silently dropped) and hosts learn-skill's workflow_nomination detector; loop-engineering, eval-gate, and brainer-audit ship deterministic local gates. brainer-audit live hooks are opt-in.

hooks.description: compliance-canary default-on drift watcher and requirements-ledger guard.
prompt-triage classifier; opt-in via plugin config.
